assertions.evidence: Targeted unittest passed and log shows Broward scrape contacted >=3 distinct hosts/endpoints (Fort Lauderdale, county-wide ArcGIS, HCED Posse).
Targeted unittests passed: county='broward' routes lookup_by_folio to bcpa.net and BCPA mock response populates owner_name, homestead=True, assessed_value=350000.
Targeted unittests passed: score threshold includes >=75 and high-scoring candidate generates storm-origin leads (source='storm', source_detail='storm_event').
Targeted normalization unittests passed: St/Street, Ave/Avenue, and Blvd/Boulevard variants normalize identically.
Direct unittest passed with leads ['123 Main St', '123 Main Street'] on same date; deduplicate_leads returned exactly 1 unique lead.
